case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. ALVARO TIJERO ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TIJERO, ALVARO $1,248.89 PRINCIPAL, $311.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,559.89, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 15026120)
